answer:
<think> The 2001 Mediterranean Games were held in Tunis, Tunisia. Tunisia is a country located in North Africa. The northernmost point of a country in North Africa would be its northernmost latitude. I need to find the northernmost latitude of Tunisia. After checking, I found that the northernmost point of Tunisia is located at a latitude of approximately 37.5°N. This is the northernmost point of the country that hosted the 2001 Mediterranean Games. </think>
<answer> 37.5°N </answer>
